title: git-tag — input
description: Input for `git tag <tag> [-m <message>]`. Step 13 (tag-and-push) writes the version-bump artifact tag locally; the companion stub Tool git-push-tag pushes it to origin. The `bot-tag-doesnt-trigger-release-prod` FailureMode (FR-008) surfaces here: GITHUB_TOKEN-authored tags do not fire downstream workflows.

tag.description: the tag name; release-train uses `v<dotted-semver>` (e.g. v1.131.0 for the marketplace series)
